name: ltr
description: LiNKtrend Runtime gateway for non-Workspace Google services, external service adapters, and local security/runtime controls.
capability_summary: Use ltr for Analytics, Ads, Search Console, YouTube, Maps, News, Env Context, Vault secrets, and sandboxed execution. Workspace services are provided by gws.

parameters.name: service
parameters.description: Top-level selector (analytics, search-console, ads, news, maps, env, youtube, vault, sandbox).

parameters.name: args
parameters.description: Additional CLI flags/values passed through to ltr commands.

subcommands.name: analytics report
subcommands.description: Run GA4 report queries through Analytics Data API.

subcommands.name: ads campaigns
subcommands.description: Fetch campaign overview metrics through Google Ads API.

subcommands.name: news search
subcommands.description: Search real-time news via Apify actor integration.

subcommands.name: vault set
subcommands.description: Encrypt and store secret values using LSL_MASTER_KEY.

subcommands.name: sandbox run
subcommands.description: Execute shell command in an ephemeral Docker container.

flags.name: --help
flags.description: Show command help and available usage patterns.

flags.name: --version
flags.description: Show ltr CLI version and active service inventory.

flags.name: --json
flags.description: Emit structured JSON output for machine/agent consumption.
